executives.name: Lynn J. Good
executives.background: Lynn J. Good is Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer of Duke Energy. She has served as CEO since 2013 and Chair since 2016. Previously, she served as Duke Energy's Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Brian D. Savoy
executives.background: Brian D. Savoy is Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. He previously served as Executive Vice President, Chief Strategy and Commercial Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Dhiaa M. Jamil
executives.background: Dhiaa M. Jamil is Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. He has held various leadership roles in nuclear and fossil generation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Kodwo Gharbi-Enchill
executives.background: Kodwo Gharbi-Enchill is Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer. He joined Duke Energy in 2021 from Deloitte & Touche LLP.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer

board_of_directors.name: Lynn J. Good
board_of_directors.background: Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer of Duke Energy Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Annette K. Clayton
board_of_directors.background: Former Chief Executive Officer and Chair of Schneider Electric North America.

board_of_directors.name: Theodore F. Craver, Jr.
board_of_directors.background: Retired Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of Edison International.

board_of_directors.name: Robert M. Davis
board_of_directors.background: Chairman, Chief Executive Officer and President of Merck & Co., Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Caroline Dorsa
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated.

board_of_directors.name: W. Roy J. Bostock
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of the Partnership for New York City and former Chairman of Yahoo! Inc.

sources.source_description: Duke Energy Corporation DEF 14A Proxy Statement
